title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Co-operative Development Corporation Act, 1962. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1***. (3) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 32 of 1973, s. 2 (w.e.f. 21-8-1973). 2. 14th March, 1963, vide notification No. G.S.R. 456, dated 14th March, 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
